caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses stands against a plain black background, speaking and gesturing with her hands. She is wearing a light green, embroidered tunic with a dark necklace and a small lapel microphone clipped to her collar. In the bottom left corner of the scene, a small circular logo is visible alongside the text "NPTEL". As the sequence progresses, the woman continues to talk, with her mouth opening and closing and her head shifting slightly. Her hands remain raised in front of her chest, moving subtly to emphasize her speech. The setting and her attire remain constant throughout the clip, with the only changes being her facial expressions and the slight movement of her hands and head as she delivers her presentation.
